ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Closed Lost or Closed - No Change/Lost for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) && (ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed Lost") || ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - No Change/Lost")) && (TEXT(Close_Reason__c) = "" || ISNULL(CloseDate) || ISNULL(Lost_Date__c ) || ISNULL(Close_Narrative__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Close Date, Lost Date, Close Reason and Closed/Lost Narrative.
